channel.title: Random on m9s

item.title: (m9s)mylearnings init: How I setup hugo for my knowledge base
item.description:
How I setup Hugo for my knowledge base

Basic Setup

  1. Follow Hugo getting started Quick Start to get Hugo installed and running.
  2. Clone the hugo-paper theme. Follow the Quick Start Page for reference.
  3. Create a new Hugo site using the theme.
  4. Modify the hugo.toml file for hugo-paper.
  5. Run hugo server to start the server.

Creating a new post

Markdown Cheatshee: markdown-guide

  1. Run hugo new content post/my-post.md to create a new post. Where my-post.md is the name of the post.
    • The post will be created in the content/post directory.
  2. Edit the post file.
    • Update the content of the front matter.
    • Add content below the front matter.
  3. Set the draft parameter to false to publish the post.

Adding a menu

Reference : hugo-menus
